meta.title: Full Project Renovation: AI-Driven Agile Archaeology & Refactor Plan

hero.title: Full Project Renovation: AI-Driven Agile Archaeology & Refactor Plan
hero.subtitle: End design drift and technical debt through AI archaeology, data boundary isolation, and a TDD pipeline.

roles.heading: Modernization Pipeline: 4 Core Roles
roles.subheading: Precisely define human-AI collaboration boundaries to drastically reduce tribal knowledge overhead.

cards.title: Code Archaeologist
cards.description: Excavate hidden business logic from legacy code and eliminate dead code.

cards.title: Data Boundary Planner
cards.description: Define clean frontend types, block dirty backend data, and consolidate derived computation logic.

cards.title: Behavior Test Architect
cards.description: Transform business logic into BDD test cases to ensure nothing breaks during refactoring.

cards.title: Documentation Auditor
cards.description: Rigorously audit code coverage to ensure every surviving code path is documented.

figma.heading: Figma Design System: 3-Tier Token Physical Isolation
figma.subheading: End free-form design. Copy and frontend fields stay permanently aligned via i18n-key.

mock_issues.title: Build new BookingCard static component per Figma
Write booking code validation Edge Cases acceptance tests

phases.title: Phase 1: Archaeology & Data Boundaries
phases.risk: 🔥 Risk checkpoint: Initiate technical change discussion with PM

phases.title: Phase 2: Figma System Reorganization
phases.description: 100% As-is screen restoration and variable import

phases.title: Phase 3: Development & Refactor Launch
phases.description: TDD execution pipeline, PRD to Issues development
